name: public_health_clinical_trial_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A Public Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public health clinical trial marrowbridge lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Amina Haddad
agents.identity: I am Amina Haddad, accountable for a defensible call in Public Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Harper Kaur
agents.identity: I am Harper Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Amina Haddad must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Amina Haddad do?
